scripts.copy-codemirror: shx mkdir -p public/vendor/codemirror && shx cp -r node_modules/codemirror/lib public/vendor/codemirror/ && shx cp -r node_modules/codemirror/mode public/vendor/codemirror/ && shx cp -r node_modules/codemirror/addon public/vendor/codemirror/
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run copy-codemirror && node dist/app.js
